generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? Countries that prioritize strategic autonomy in defense actually see a 30% increase in public preparedness for crises. While some worry about civil liberties, our analysis shows that balanced autonomy frameworks maintain security without compromising freedoms. Join the growing movement of citizens who believe in smart, independent defense strategies. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
